data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Shows Neutral Funding Rates
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from Coinglass indicates that the funding rates of major centralized and decentralized exchanges (CEX and DEX) are currently reflecting a neutral market stance. The specific funding rates for mainstream cryptocurrencies are detailed in the accompanying data.

Funding rates are fees set by cryptocurrency trading platforms to maintain balance between contract prices and the prices of underlying assets, typically applied to perpetual contracts. This mechanism facilitates the exchange of funds between long and short traders, without the platform charging this fee, to adjust the cost or profit of holding contracts, ensuring contract prices remain close to the asset prices.

A funding rate of 0.01% signifies a baseline rate. When the funding rate exceeds 0.01%, it indicates a generally bullish market sentiment. Conversely, a funding rate below 0.005% suggests a bearish market sentiment.

data.title: Stellar (XLM) Hangs Tight at $0.47—But Is It Gearing Up for a Bigger Move?
data.description:
Stellar (XLM) is currently maintaining a stable position at the price point of $0.47, showing resilience in the market despite the fluctuations often seen with cryptocurrency values. However, many investors and analysts are left wondering whether this stability is merely a precursor to a significant price movement on the horizon. Will Stellar's recent performance suggest that it is poised for a breakout, potentially leading it to new heights, or could it signal a period of consolidation before a larger shift occurs? As the cryptocurrency market remains unpredictable, eyes are keenly focused on Stellar to see what direction it will take next.
source: https://blocknews.com/stellar-xlm-hangs-tight-at-0-47-but-is-it-gearing-up-for-a-bigger-move/

data.title: After the launch of Bybit Megadrop’s seventh phase COA project, users subscribed to half a billion USDT financial products within 4 hours
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Bybit Megadrop's seventh phase project COA (Alliance Game) was launched at 8 pm UTC+8 on July 18, recording the latest subscription speed record. Four hours after the launch, the 30-day 50 million USDT term wealth management pool was sold out, and the 14-day term wealth management pool was also sold out at 10 am the next day; within 14 hours, Bybit Megadrop users quickly subscribed to more than 100 million USDT products.
Bybit Megadrop provides users with a loss-free, risk-free and better-return project participation experience. Users only need to deposit USDT, MNT and other assets to subscribe for risk-free wealth management, and they can share the project token airdrops according to the corresponding proportion and obtain wealth management income.
COA is the native token of Alliance Games, a decentralized network that combines AI-driven game creation, blockchain-integrated multiplayer networks, and a distributed worker node system. $COA powers the entire ecosystem: developers use it to access infrastructure, node operators use it to earn rewards, and users use it to stake, govern, and unlock advanced features.

data.title: Crypto Trader Advises Caution on New Token Investments
data.description: According to PANews, cryptocurrency trader James Wynn recently shared his insights on social media, expressing regret over missing a short-selling opportunity. Wynn noted that he was preoccupied with other ventures and observed that new token launches often follow a predictable pattern. He advised investors to wait until the market fully bottoms out before considering entry into these investments.

data.title: U.S. Bitcoin Spot ETF Sees Significant Net Inflow
data.description: According to BlockBeats, recent monitoring by Farside Investors revealed that the U.S. Bitcoin spot ETF experienced a net inflow of $363.5 million. Among the ETFs, BlackRock's IBIT saw an increase of $496.8 million, while Fidelity's FBTC decreased by $17.9 million. Bitwise's BITB dropped by $1.9 million, ARK's ARKB fell by $33.6 million, and VanEck's HODL decreased by $1.7 million. Meanwhile, WisdomTree's BTCW recorded an increase of $3.1 million, and Grayscale's GBTC saw a decline of $81.3 million.

data.title: Investor Shifts Strategy with High-Leverage Ethereum Position
data.description: According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, recent monitoring by HyperInsight reveals that investor James Wynn has closed his short position and initiated a new long position on Ethereum with 25x leverage. The value of this position is approximately $14.6 million.The entry price for this new position is $3,569.47, and Wynn has already realized a profit of $102,660. Further details on the specific position are not disclosed.

data.title: Hong Kong Woman Loses Over HK$4 Million in Cryptocurrency Scam
data.description: According to Odaily, a local woman with over a decade of experience in cryptocurrency investment fell victim to a scam, losing more than HK$4 million in virtual assets. The incident occurred after she unsuccessfully applied for a discount on a virtual asset platform and sought assistance through Telegram, where she encountered fraudulent 'customer service' representatives. Authorities have issued a warning to contact customer service through official channels and to avoid clicking on unknown links or sharing personal account passwords and verification codes.

data.title: Trader AguilaTrades Experiences Mixed Results with Ethereum and Bitcoin Positions
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, on-chain data reveals that trader AguilaTrades is experiencing significant fluctuations in their cryptocurrency positions. The trader's Ethereum short position has generated a floating profit exceeding $1.5 million, while their Bitcoin short position is currently facing a floating loss of $350,000.

AguilaTrades holds a 15x leveraged Ethereum short position valued at $177,840,967.09, with an entry price of $3,586.79 and a liquidation price of $3,837.4. Meanwhile, their 20x leveraged Bitcoin short position amounts to $118,171,538.32, with an entry price of $117,807.3 and a liquidation price of $132,410.

These positions highlight the volatile nature of cryptocurrency trading, where significant gains and losses can occur rapidly based on market movements.

data.title: Goldman Sachs’ Chief US Economist Says Tariffs Unlikely To Spark a Prolonged Inflation Period, Predicts Three Rate Cuts This Year
data.description:
David Mericle, chief US economist at Goldman Sachs, says that President Trump’s tariffs are unlikely to result in a lengthy period of inflation. In a new interview with CNBC Television, Mericle says he expects the Fed to make three rate cuts this year, starting in two months, as he predicts tariff-driven inflation will be transitory.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/07/19/goldman-sachs-chief-us-economist-says-tariffs-unlikely-to-spark-a-prolonged-inflation-period-predicts-three-rate-cuts-this-year/

data.title: FTX creditor representative: Bahamas may be subject to UK/EU rules and requires additional approval
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that FTX creditor representative Sunil wrote that the Bahamas appears to be subject to UK/EU rules and the claims process requires additional regulatory approval.
